title: NearByAlert
description: NearbyAlert is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that warns you when other players are nearby .
body:
# 📌 NearbyAlert

NearbyAlert is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that warns you when other players are close.

When a player enters a 150-block radius, a clean on-screen alert appears showing their name and the direction they’re coming from. If multiple players are nearby, NearbyAlert intelligently cycles through them so your screen stays uncluttered.

# ✨ Features

- 🔍 Detects nearby players within 150 blocks

- 🧭 Direction arrow (↑ ↓ ← →) based on camera rotation

- 🎯 Works through walls (no line-of-sight required)

- 🔄 Cycles multiple players every 5 seconds

- 🎨 Dynamic color based on distance

- ⌨️ Toggle on/off with K

### 🪶 Lightweight & client-side only

# 🎨 Distance Colors

- 🔴 0–30 blocks → Danger (Red)

- 🟡 31–75 blocks → Warning (Yellow)

- 🟢 76–150 blocks → Safe (Green)

# ⚙ Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.21

- Fabric Loader

- Client-side only (no server required)
